view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario of a '5-session package purchase', but the evidence provided does not confirm the necessary outcomes or behaviors associated with this scenario. While there are linked use cases and prior steps that indicate successful bookings, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating the specific scenario behavior or the expected result of a clear, actionable failure report. This leads to an inconclusive status as the required validation cannot be asserted based on the current evidence.
